creator: pi@FreeBSD.org
text:
We use some local special case for phabricator usernames:
- "user" is the users email in the general case and
- "user" is the "user"@freebsd.org in the special case of users with
  user@freebsd.org mail addresses.

I hope my explaination is not too confusing. I think this allows some
magic to automatically match commits to users who did the commit or so.

If in the future you get the astrodog@freebsd.org address, we can change it.
